blast_radius: Cross-language contract bump v2→v3 across Kotlin emit/bridge + Python train/export; new model module + adjacency builder; new SimBenchmark mode; experiment.

review_focus.item: v3 contract table — every width/version site moves in lockstep; fallbacks fail-loud
review_focus.why: a missed site silently mis-decodes training data

review_focus.item: coords in a separate f32 spatial_coords block (spatial is u8)
review_focus.why: u8 clamps [0,255]; signed/large coords would corrupt the adjacency builder

review_focus.item: neighbor_index built on BOTH sides (Python train / JVM inference) — 3-way parity
review_focus.why: divergent neighbor defns silently break the GNN

review_focus.item: ONNX export of gather-GNN + hand-rolled attention at opset 17
review_focus.why: scatter/SDPA are unsupported/wrong; validate small-rung export first

review_focus.item: the training-regime confound (v4 may not fix Medium)
review_focus.why: recorded diagnosis blames undertraining; report negative plainly

top_decisions.decision: GNN = gather neighbors + masked-reduce over fixed degree-6 axis
top_decisions.rejected: edge_index + scatter_add (broken/silently-wrong ONNX export on duplicate indices)
nn.MultiheadAttention / F.scaled_dot_product_attention (no native ONNX attn < opset 23)

top_decisions.decision: coords in a separate f32 spatial_coords block
top_decisions.rejected: appending coords to the u8 spatial channels (clamps/corrupts)

top_decisions.decision: neighbor_index as int64 ONNX inputs, built JVM-side from the live TileMap at inference
top_decisions.rejected: folding into spatial / emitting an edge list in the shard

top_decisions.decision: proceed with v4 despite the undertraining confound; report negative plainly

risks.text: ONNX export of gather-GNN / hand-rolled attention fails at opset 17
risks.mitigation: no scatter/SDPA; small-rung export smoke test first

risks.text: Python adjacency diverges from the Kotlin engine (silent)
risks.mitigation: shared pure fn; 3-way parity (Python==Kotlin==live-engine) incl. wrap+ragged+rectangular

risks.text: confound: v4 worse on Medium under from-scratch training
risks.mitigation: budget constant; report train/eval gap + Medium curve; report negative plainly; ladder starts small
fail-loud fallbacks (edits); contract-version refusal test; fingerprint gate
D8 hard gate; ladder rejects rung (OOM via SIGKILL rc137)

rollback: Contract version gate refuses incompatible artifacts; datasets perishable (regenerate); revert the branch.

change_inventory.why: spatial_coords block, global map-dims, entity tile-index, construction fix
int64 path + forwardRich neighbor build + want-list

verification: ./gradlew test — dataplane unit tests incl. construction-collision (AC7) + legality
run_loop --variant structured — Tiny+Medium curves; 200-game Medium z-test (AC1); Tiny non-regression
open_questions: train/eval-gap underfitting signal uses a calibrated value_loss-trend proxy (no held-out train win-rate exists) — may add a train-batch argmax pass if it proves uninformative
